name: git-history-rewrite
description: Safety net for destructive git operations — `git filter-repo`, the `git push --force` family, and `git reset --hard` to non-HEAD targets. The skill names the correct form for each; the bundled PreToolUse hook blocks invocations missing the required flags; the agent covers the discipline items (sibling backup ref, off-repo bundle, post-rewrite verification, smallest-tool selection) the hook cannot enforce mechanically.
